Submit a Webflow app

This form can be used to submit your app to our Marketplace review team.

Before submitting, please review our Marketplace Guidelines. ‍

All input values (except file uploads) are autosaved until the form is submitted.

  • App info
  • Creator info
  • App details
  • Support info
  • Acknowledgements

App developer's company name

App info

Indicate whether you are submitting a new app or an update to an existing submission.
Updates must contain an exact match of the previous submission's App Name or Client ID.

For App Updates, please note that only the Client ID is required. All other fields are optional. When updating, we recommend filling in only the fields you wish to modify, leaving the rest unchanged.

Character limit: 30 characters

⚠️ The App Name field is locked for existing apps. If you need to update your app's name, please submit a request through our Support team at https://support.webflow.com/
Verify Client ID
Error message
Success message

‍Select the option that best represents your app. Learn more

The OAuth Authorization URL used to install the app in Webflow.

Required if you selected "Data Client" or "Both" in the App capabilities. Leave blank for Designer Extensions.

Installation URL scopes must match your app configuration exactly.

File Type(s): PNG
Dimensions: 900px by 900px, 1:1 aspect ratio
Title of file should be avatar alt text
‍
Accepted: Logomarks (pictoral marks); Not accepted: Logotypes (text)

Max file size 50kb.
Uploading...
fileuploaded.jpg
Upload failed. Max size for files is 10 MB.

Public listings are visible to everyone in the Marketplace, while Private listings are not displayed in the public Marketplace interface. However, users outside of your Workspace can still install private apps if they have the direct URL to the listing.

Private apps undergo the same review process as public apps and must meet all guidelines to be approved. Apps that don't comply with all requirements may be rejected regardless of visibility status.

Creator info

The email you use to log in to Webflow

Your preferred email to receive correspondence about your app submission

App details

Select up to 2 options that best describe your app
Use CMD+Click/CTRL+Click to select multiple

0 of 2 categories selected

Character limit: 100 characters

Character limit: 10,000 characters
Markdown supported, but not links

Hello World!

Some initial bold text


Provide a 1-2 min. video for your app's listing page that highlighting features for prospective users. (optional)

Accepted: Video should be hosted on Youtube

Success message
Error message

Dimensions: 1280px by 846px 
4 screenshots minimum 
Accepted: Highlight the app features with clear visuals

Bulleted list of up to five highlighted app features

Add the website URL where users can learn more about your app/company

Add any other relevant information for reviewers. Note: App credentials should be provided in the dedicated App Credentials section above, not in this notes field.

App Access Credentials

⚠️

Critical for Review Process

App access credentials are required for our review team to test your app thoroughly. The account must have permanent access to the highest tier with all features unlocked.

Please provide login credentials for our review team, including username, email, password, and any additional details needed. When creating an account, please use marketplaceteam@webflow.com and share setup details in the Notes.

Character count: 4/2000
⚠️

Marketplace Agreement

By providing these credentials, you agree that Webflow may access your app at any time for review, audit, and quality assurance purposes. Account access must remain active for the duration of your app's presence in the Webflow Marketplace.

💰 Paid App Requirements

Since your app has paid features, the provided account must be permanently upgraded to bypass all paywalls.

Failure to provide proper credentials or ensure access remains active will result in review delays and may lead to app delisting.

Support info

Provide a walkthrough of App installation, setup, and usage for the review team

Add the website URL where users can access your Privacy Policy

Add an email or website URL where users can contact your customer support

Add the website URL where users can access your Terms and Conditions

Acknowledgements

Thank you! Your submission has been received.

Our team will get back to you after reviewing your application.
